      | f.comp g, k => trNormal g (Cont'.comp f k)

α : Type u_1
p : α → Prop

    All p t →
      All p
        (match t with
        | nil => nil
        | node c a y b =>
          match cut y with
          | Ordering.lt =>
            match a.isBlack with
            | black => (Batteries.RBNode.del cut a).balLeft y b
            | red => node red (Batteries.RBNode.del cut a) y b
          | Ordering.gt =>
            match b.isBlack with
            | black => a.balRight y (Batteries.RBNode.del cut b)
            | red => node red a y (Batteries.RBNode.del cut b)
          | Ordering.eq => a.append b)

    | a :: b :: l =>
      let l' := (b :: l).dropLast;
      let b' := (b :: l).getLast ⋯;
      cast ⋯ (cons_append a l' b' (bidirectionalRec nil singleton cons_append l'))) =
    cons_append a l b
      (match l with
      | [] => nil
      | [a] => singleton a
      | a :: b :: l =>
        let l' := (b :: l).dropLast;
        let b' := (b :: l).getLast ⋯;
        cast ⋯ (cons_append a l' b' (bidirectionalRec nil singleton cons_append l')))
